nasb.text: Jehoshaphat was afraid and turned his attention to seek the Lord, and proclaimed a fast throughout all Judah.

esv.text: Then Jehoshaphat was afraid and set his face to seek the Lord, and proclaimed a fast throughout all Judah.

cnv.text: 於是約沙法害怕起來，定意要尋求耶和華，就在猶大全地宣告禁食。

ccb.text: 约沙法很害怕，决定寻求耶和华，在整个犹大宣告禁食。
